title: New required permissions for GitHub App fine-grained tokens
raw_changelog: Starting April 15, 2026, the contents:write permission is now required for the POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/git/refs endpoint when using fine-grained personal access tokens or GitHub App tokens.
before_text:
## Create a reference

POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/git/refs

### Permissions
- Fine-grained tokens: contents:read
after_text:
## Create a reference

POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/git/refs

### Permissions
- Fine-grained tokens: contents:write (changed from contents:read, effective April 15, 2026)
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@
 ### Permissions
-- Fine-grained tokens: contents:read
+- Fine-grained tokens: contents:write (changed from contents:read, effective April 15, 2026)

ground_truth.breaking_reason: Permission requirement changed from read to write. Existing tokens with only read permission will fail.
ground_truth.action_required: Update fine-grained tokens to include contents:write permission before April 15, 2026.
